features: Durable Construction: Our white plastic carrier bags are crafted from premium materials, ensuring reliable strength to safely carry items without tearing or ripping.
Generous Dimensions: With a size of 18 x 15 x 3", our carrier bags provide ample space for a wide range of products, making them versatile for various retail and home applications.
Convenient Handles: Equipped with sturdy handles, our carrier bags ensure comfortable carrying and easy transport for customers or for organizing items at home.
Professional Appearance: The crisp white color of our patch handle carrier bags presents a clean and polished look, enhancing the presentation of your merchandise both in-store and at home.

Multi-Purpose Usage: Perfect for groceries, clothing, books, and more, our carrier bags with handles cater to diverse retail needs and are also suitable for home organization and storage, making them an indispensable choice for businesses and households alike. Upgrade your shopping and storage experience with our premium white plastic carrier bags.
description: Product Description SUPERIOR STRENGTH Crafted from premium polyethylene plastic, these high-quality carrier bags are exceptionally strong and durable. The 17mu thickness ensures outstanding tensile strength for reliable performance. STANDARD RETAIL DIMENSIONS Measuring 13 x 19 x 23 inches (Height: 23 inches/58cm, Width: 13 inches/33cm, Width including side gussets: 19 inches/48cm), these large carrier bags are perfectly suited for a variety of retail needs. WATERPROOF AND SECURE The medium-duty plastic material used in these vest carrier bags provides excellent protection against weather and elements, ensuring that your belongings remain safe and dry. With long handles, these vest style plastic carrier bags are designed for easy carrying and tying. FOOD SAFE AND VERSATILE Our plastic bags are food-safe and highly versatile, suitable for a wide range of uses. Made from durable polyethylene, these large plastic carrier bags are perfect for takeaway meals. Whether you need plastic takeaway bags or carrier bags with handles, our white plastic bags are designed to meet your needs. VERSATILE USAGE Designed for both private and commercial purposes, these plastic carrier bags with handles are highly versatile. Ideal for groceries, shopping, supermarkets, newsagents, takeaway food, bottles, pet waste, sanitary items, bin liners, car trash, cleaning supplies, dirty shoes, soiled clothing, and travel.
